violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Hand towels hung from drawer handles behind bar. Recommend using single use towels for hand drying.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Back storage/prep room has shelves with exposed particle board. Advise sealing.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Toilet facilities. — --Both men's and women's toilet room was not provided with a self closing door.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Walk in cooler used to store both food products and beer have walls in need of cleaning.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. -Back storage/prep area has paint cans stored above non-commercial oven.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
